summary: DHH celebrates Rails reaching 2,000 downloads within its first month of public release. The post breaks down the numbers between GEM and zip/tgz versions, and notes that Rails packages have claimed three spots in the top 10 Ruby Gems list. He teases an upcoming release with new features.
key_points: Rails hit 2,000 total downloads (438 GEM, 1,581 zip/tgz) within roughly one month of release
Rails-related packages (ActiveRecord, ActionPack, Rails) held three spots in the Ruby Gems top 10
A new release with significant additions was imminent
money_quotes: Rails has climbed above and beyond two thousand downloads.
This is roughly within the first month of release, so quite an achievement.
key_insight: A brief, triumphant milestone post marking Rails' early traction — 2,000 downloads in a month — a number charmingly quaint given what Rails would become.
